body:
## Summary

Fixes #110.

- Pins the web app shell to the current `visualViewport` width, height, and offset so focusing the mobile input keeps the topbar, chat, and composer inside the visible viewport.
- Adds configurable whole-UI skins (`flat`, `glass`, `contrast`) and chat styles (`cards`, `compact`, `bubbles`) alongside the existing input style/action settings.
- Persists `uiSkin` and `chatStyle`, includes them in generated issue-report context, and localizes the new settings.
- Adds issue #110 case-study evidence under `docs/case-studies/issue-110/`, including raw GitHub exports, logs, screenshots, root-cause analysis, and viewport research links.

## Reproduction And Tests

- Reproducing e2e test before the fix: `cd tests/e2e && npm run test:local -- --grep "Issue #110"` failed with topbar `y = 0` while `visualViewport.offsetTop = 180`; saved in `docs/case-studies/issue-110/raw-data/issue110-test-before.log`.
- After the fix: `cd tests/e2e && npm run test:local -- --grep "Issue #110"`: 1 passed.
- Final focused mobile/style regression: `cd tests/e2e && npm run test:local -- --grep "Issue #(108|110)"`: 5 passed.
- Full Playwright local suite: `cd tests/e2e && npm run test:local`: 87 passed.
- Rust/local CI checks: `cargo fmt --all -- --check`, `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features`, `rust-script scripts/check-file-size.rs`, `cargo test --all-features --verbose`, and `cargo test --doc --verbose` passed.

## Screenshots

Before, focused input hides the topbar/chat:

![Before mobile focused](https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/blob/issue-110-2af174f3ddb8/docs/case-studies/issue-110/screenshots/current-mobile-focused.png?raw=true)

After, the app shell follows the visual viewport offset:

![After mobile focused](https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/blob/issue-110-2af174f3ddb8/docs/case-studies/issue-110/screenshots/after-mobile-focused-offset.png?raw=true)

After, mobile settings expose UI Skin, Chat Style, and Input Style:

![After mobile settings](https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/blob/issue-110-2af174f3ddb8/docs/case-studies/issue-110/screenshots/after-mobile-skin-settings-visible.png?raw=true)

## Research Sources

- MDN Visual Viewport API: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Visual_Viewport_API
- MDN VisualViewport reference: https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/VisualViewport
- web.dev viewport units: https://web.dev/blog/viewport-units
- MDN CSS environment variables: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/Guides/Environment_variables
title: Fix mobile keyboard viewport and add UI skin settings
